theme: AoT crash fix and dependency refresh
highlights_headline: 3.119.3 fixes an AoT crash with IlcDisableReflection and refreshes libpng, libwebp and brotli.

bullets.detail: SkiaSharp no longer crashes at startup on NativeAOT builds compiled with IlcDisableReflection=true.
The Linux ARM64 native library now bundles fontconfig correctly, fixing a startup crash on cross-compiled builds.
Updates the bundled libpng to 1.6.54, libwebp to 1.6.0 and brotli to 1.2.0, and prunes unused build dependencies.

bullets.lead: Spectre mitigation on Linux and Windows natives
bullets.detail: Both libSkiaSharp.dll and libSkiaSharp.so are now built with the Spectre mitigation flag.

contributor_summaries.sshumakov: Enabled the Spectre mitigation flag on both libSkiaSharp.dll and libSkiaSharp.so

preview_summaries.3.119.3-p1: Preview 1 landed the AoT/IlcDisableReflection fix, the Linux ARM64 fontconfig fix, the libpng/libwebp/brotli refresh and the Spectre mitigation for both Windows and Linux natives.
